allow: Bash(cd /tmp/acp-explore && grep -n "^    [a-zA-Z]*\(.*\): MaybePromise" node_modules/@agentclientprotocol/sdk/dist/acp.d.ts | sed -n '1,20p'; echo "=== AgentSideConnection or similar transport helper ==="; grep -n "class.*Connection\\|function.*[Cc]onnect" node_modules/@agentclientprotocol/sdk/dist/acp.d.ts | head -10)

Bash(cd /tmp/acp-explore && grep -n "^export declare function agent\\|ndJsonStream" node_modules/@agentclientprotocol/sdk/dist/acp.d.ts | head; echo "=== PromptRequest/Response ==="; grep -n "interface PromptRequest\\|interface PromptResponse\\b" -A 15 node_modules/@agentclientprotocol/sdk/dist/acp.d.ts | head -50)

Bash(cd /tmp/acp-explore && find node_modules/@agentclientprotocol/sdk/dist -iname "*schema*"; echo "---"; grep -rn "PromptRequest\\b" node_modules/@agentclientprotocol/sdk/dist/*.d.ts | grep -v "\\.test\\." | head -10)

Bash(cd /tmp/acp-explore && grep -n "^export interface PromptRequest\\|^export interface PromptResponse\\|^export interface NewSessionRequest\\|^export interface NewSessionResponse\\|^export interface InitializeRequest\\|^export interface InitializeResponse\\|^export interface SessionNotification\\|^export interface ContentBlock\\|^export type StopReason\\|^export interface AgentCapabilities" -A 12 node_modules/@agentclientprotocol/sdk/dist/schema/types.gen.d.ts)

Bash(cd /tmp/acp-explore && grep -n "^export type SessionUpdate " -A 5 node_modules/@agentclientprotocol/sdk/dist/schema/types.gen.d.ts; echo "=== agent_message_chunk variant ==="; grep -n "agent_message_chunk" -B2 -A8 node_modules/@agentclientprotocol/sdk/dist/schema/types.gen.d.ts | head -20; echo "=== ContentBlock text variant ==="; grep -n "^export type ContentBlock " -A 3 node_modules/@agentclientprotocol/sdk/dist/schema/types.gen.d.ts; echo "=== agent\(\) AppOptions/AgentApp ==="; sed -n '590,615p' node_modules/@agentclientprotocol/sdk/dist/acp.d.ts)

hooks.command: cat >/dev/null || true; git rev-parse --git-dir >/dev/null 2>&1 && code-review-graph update --skip-flows --repo "/home/rohan-prasen/Code/monkeyDcode" || true
cat >/dev/null || true; git rev-parse --git-dir >/dev/null 2>&1 && code-review-graph status --repo "/home/rohan-prasen/Code/monkeyDcode" || echo 'Not a git repo, skipping'
